D. WICK, JDG; G.ESPINOCILLA, CLERK; M. BURNS, CSR. 9:40 A.M. CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL MARK HIMELSTEIN. DEFT PRESENT, IN PRO PER. OPENING STATEMENTS WAIVED. ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED & ADMITTED. JUDGMENT FOR PLTF AND AGAINST DEFT AS FOLLOWS: RESTITUTION & POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 2420 GEARY BLVD. APT 1, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115; RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED; RENT & DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1687.13; COSTS PER COST BILL INCL ATTY FEES PURSUANT TO DECLARATION. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN. PLTF TO PREPARE THE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAYDEN, SHERION THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2420 GEARY BLVD. APT. 1 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115 $1,687.13 RENT, $1,925.55 ATTORNEY FEES, $229.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,841.68, LEASE FORFEITED
